contract: people/readme.md (base facets only -- mentee brains ship no facet packs)

base_facets.name: full display name
base_facets.status: one-line current state (condensed from the card's status strip)
base_facets.skills: kebab-case skill tags, evidence lives in prose
base_facets.contexts: how/where you know them (kebab-case: pf-cohort-1, referral source...)
base_facets.last-fold: YYYY-MM-DD of newest dated entry on the card

rules.unregistered_fields: verifier flags any frontmatter key not listed here (schema drift protection)
rules.fill: facet-fill harvests existing card prose first, transcripts only when thin; never fabricate -- omit unknowns
rules.maintenance: every people-fold (transcript-processor People fold) updates the touched card's facets in scope
rules.enforcement: frontmatter required only on cards touched after contract_date; legacy cards grow it opportunistically
rules.app_boundary: people cards NEVER push to the app -- brain-side only; card-sharing arrives later as an opt-in app feature
